utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage with physical and mental health insurance and costs, (2) property_coverage with home/contents insurance and costs, (3) travel_coverage with travel insurance and costs, (4) additional_services with enhancement services and costs, and (5) total_budget with complete cost breakdown. The final coverage plan includes all five: health_coverage (both physical and mental specified with costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with cost), travel_coverage (travel insurance with cost), additional_services (extra coverage with cost), and total_budget (overall cost breakdown). Each item is fully specified with appropriate details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: (1) physical health under 'Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio84' (not in the ground truth, so no direct rating match), (2) mental health under 'Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio83' (also not in the ground truth), (3) property_coverage as 'InsurePlus Standard Plan5'—the closest match in the ground truth is 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under property_protection with rating 9, (4) travel_coverage as 'InsurePlus Standard Plan7'—the closest match is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance with rating 10, and (5) additional_services as 'Adventure Travel/Sports Coverage (plan_option12)'—the closest match is 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. The 'Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio' items do not correspond to any available ground-truth plan names and thus cannot be assigned a rating.
